title: Jeff The Land Shark v.1 [Cobblemon 1.7]
description: Mrr! Adds Jeff the Land Shark from Marvel Rivals to Cobblemon.
body:
🦈 Jeff the Land Shark comes to Cobblemon!

This datapack adds Jeff the Land Shark from Marvel Rivals into Cobblemon, bringing everyone’s favorite adorable-but-deadly shark to the Pokémon world.


![Jeff the Land Shark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1eeb029b5fc6f84ffcf491a731c3f46bda6a2df_0.webp)


Jeff is implemented as a fully functional Cobblemon Pokémon, complete with a custom moveset designed to fit naturally within the Cobblemon experience. Whether you want him as a companion, a battler, or just the cutest menace in your world, Jeff is ready to chomp his way into your team.

## CREDITS
## Textures by Dogtor Bloo, base model by Gesteey, animations by Coolrex
##
